response.text:

rationale: r1c0's SoC (0.20) is below your minimum share threshold (0.40), and your belief indicates r0c0 is approaching critical—prioritize protecting your own reserve and defer this request until your SoC stabilizes above threshold.

user:

Your latest belief: SoC declining despite outbound shares; geographic peers in need but r0c0 approaching critical threshold. Prioritize inbound requests and verify energy delivery. Fallback to round-robin with conservative reserve..
